response.justification: Aisha has extensive full-stack and systems engineering experience across 15+ years, including notable contributions to AI-agent infrastructure and high-scale systems, but lacks explicit evidence of AI product/platform building, entrepreneurial experience, or recognized AI expertise. Her technical breadth is strong, but the role's emphasis on AI strategy and innovation is not sufficiently demonstrated.
strengths: 15+ years of full-stack and systems engineering experience across diverse domains
Direct involvement in AI-agent infrastructure and developer tooling (MCP, agentic workflows)
Proven ability to optimize and scale systems (e.g., Direct Mail platform, real-time metadata handling)
concerns: No clear evidence of building AI-powered products or platforms (core requirement)
Lacks entrepreneurial/startup experience within larger organizations (preferred qualification)
No advanced degree (Master's/PhD) in AI-related field (preferred qualification)
